briefdescription.para: This function initializes the AXI4-Stream Switch core.

detaileddescription.para: This function must be called prior to using the core. Initialization of the core includes setting up the instance data and ensuring the hardware is in a quiescent state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
points to the configuration structure associated with the AXI4-Stream Switch core.
is the base address of the device. If address translation is being used, then this parameter must reflect the virtual base address. Otherwise, the physical address should be used.

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function enables the MUX port specified by a MI index and links with desired SI, indicated by a SiIndex.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for enabling MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].
specifies an index that will be used as a source to MUX. The range is [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: MUX[MiIndex] is sourced from SI[SiIndex]. Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function disables the MUX port specified by a MI index and un-link SI, set previously.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for disabling MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: MUX[MiIndex] is removed for SI[SiIndex]. Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the status of whether MUX is sourced from desired SI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for addressing the MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].
specifies an index that will be used to identify, whether it is sourced. The range is [0 to 15].

listitem.para: TRUE, if MUX is sourced from SI.
FALSE, if MUX is not sourced from SI.

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function returns the status of whether MUX is disabled.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.
specifies an index that will be used for addressing the MUX which is within the range [0 to 15].

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.

briefdescription.para: This function disables all the MUX port, in turn removes association with desired SI.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XAxis_Switch core instance.

simplesect.para: Axis_Switch core connects up to 16 masters to 16 slaves.
